response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience and some exposure to high-throughput systems at Sociomantic, but the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis — the core competencies for this Principal-level Growth/Experimentation role. Seniority signals (Senior/Staff titles, product-focused work) also fall short of IC6 Principal expectations around cross-team platform ownership and systemic measurement leadership.
strengths: 15+ years across web, backend, embedded, and distributed systems
High-scale low-latency experience at Sociomantic (millions of req/s)
Demonstrated mentorship via workshops, talks, and OSS projects
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, or feature-flagging platform experience
No telemetry/metrics infrastructure or statistical analysis background
Career trajectory (Senior/Staff, product teams) is below Principal/IC6 scope

key_factors.factor: No telemetry/metrics infra or data-aptitude evidence
Long tenure with some high-scale distributed systems exposure
